title: Anchorage Digital expands Tron support with institutional TRX staking
summary: Institutions can now stake Tron's native token directly from Anchorage's custody platform as the company expands support for one of the largest USDT settlement networks.

title: Bitcoin jumps on lowest US CPI since 2020 as traders stay wary of $64K failure
summary: BTC price action returned to $64,000 on low US CPI inflation but traders stayed wary of rejection at key resistance.

title: Warsh Says Fed Has ‘No Tolerance’ for Elevated Inflation
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said policymakers at the central bank have no tolerance for high inflation, reiterating a vow to tame price growth that has been elevated for five years.

title: India Asks State Banks to Step Up Foreign Currency Deposits
summary: India has asked state-owned banks to intensify efforts to garner foreign currency deposits from the 35-million-strong diaspora, as the country seeks to boost its external buffers and shore up the flagging rupee.

title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
summary: Moving crypto into a lending protocol or liquidity pool won’t count as a taxable disposal, deferring the charge until a real cash-out.

title: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin-buying machine stayed in neutral, while BTC and crypto majors chop and oil spikes ahead of a key CPI print this morning.

title: Benchmark sees ‘long pathway for growth’ in Hut 8, raises target to $165 on $16.8 billion AI data center deals
summary: Benchmark raised Hut 8's target to $165, citing $16.8 billion in AI data center contracts and Beacon Point commercialization.

title: Tether leads $7 million round in Pact Labs to boost USAT stablecoin adoption
summary: “Pact Labs gives us the rails to make digital dollars designed to be compliant with U.S. regulations," says Tether USAT.

title: Wall Street banks post blockbuster profits as equities trading booms
summary: JPMorgan, Goldman, Citi and BofA kick off earnings season with strong results

title: RIP the US state department
